summary: Classified each hydrated open PR independently from the live inventory shard. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, close actions, or fix artifacts are planned because the job disables merge/fix/raise_pr/instant-close/low-signal closeout and each PR still requires maintainer or technical judgment.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft PR with compatibility risk and explicit maintainer-review requirement; this is not a low-signal or closure candidate.
Focused test fix with actionable bot review comments and a failing proof check; maintainer technical judgment is required before any finalization.
Focused test fix with unresolved bot review comments and failed proof check; keep open for maintainer technical review.
Product compatibility decision is explicit and active author follow-up is present; maintainer judgment is required before close, merge, or rework.
Focused test-only PR has a potentially addressed but still artifact-visible bot finding plus failing proof check; maintainer technical review is required.

needs_human: #90195: maintainer-owned draft plugin compatibility PR needs maintainer review; no merge/fix action is allowed in this job.
#90217: focused test fix has actionable Copilot review comments and failing Real behavior proof; maintainer technical judgment required.
#90223: focused qqbot test fix has actionable Copilot review comments, superseded re-review context, and failing Real behavior proof; maintainer technical judgment required.
#90226: session reset default change is an explicit product/compatibility decision with active author follow-up; maintainer judgment required.

#90230: focused Windows backup-permission test PR has an artifact-visible bot concern that may be addressed by later commits plus failing Real behavior proof; maintainer technical verification required.
